sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n5885" key="a)mfiknefh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀμφικνεφής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n5885.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">wrapped in darkness,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">βυθός</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Orac.Chald.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">242</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
